title: Coblemon:Expierence Boost
description:
ExperienceBoost — Global XP & Shiny Boosts for Server Events with OP-Controlled Items!

ExperienceBoost lets server admins easily trigger temporary global XP multipliers across the entire server—perfect for events, celebrations, or special gameplay moments
body:
ExperienceBoost
⭐️ Global XP & Shiny Boosts for Server Events with OP-Controlled Items!

🎉 Overview:
ExperienceBoost allows server admins to trigger powerful, temporary global XP multipliers across the entire server—ideal for events, celebrations, and special gameplay moments! This mod introduces exclusive OP-only items that let players activate XP boosts themselves, while maintaining strict admin control.

ExperienceBoost requires the popular Cobblemon Shiny Boosters mod by Painty to enable the shiny boost item functionality. It builds upon the same core concept, expanding global boost options with custom XP multipliers and OP-controlled boost items.

✨ Features:

🔥 Customizable global XP multiplier commands with multiplier and duration parameters

🎁 OP-only items granting players the ability to activate XP boosts during events

💎 Boost items correspond to 5x, 10x, 15x, and 20x multipliers for XP and shiny boosts

⚠️ Items are non-craftable and only obtainable via OP commands to prevent exploitation

🔗 Requires: Cobblemon Shiny Boosters mod by Painty for shiny boost items

⚙️ Lightweight, Fabric-compatible mod

🔧 Inspired by the shiny boost system, but focused on global XP and event flexibility

🎮 Example Command:
/experienceboost 2 600 — Applies a 2x XP multiplier globally for 10 minutes

👑 Why Choose ExperienceBoost?
Create engaging global events with easy-to-manage XP and shiny boosts. Empower trusted players with exclusive items to activate boosts, while ensuring admins retain ultimate control.

📦 Installation:
Add both ExperienceBoost and Cobblemon Shiny Boosters to your Fabric mods folder.

🛠️ Details:

⚙️ Mod Loader: Fabric

👤 Created by: Gabrieli2806

🎨 Shiny Boost Items: Powered by Cobblemon Shiny Boosters mod by Painty
